projects.title: Embedded Sensor Platform
projects.summary: An embedded sensing platform focused on acquisition, firmware control, signal handling, and repeatable test documentation.
highlights: Developed firmware flow for sensor sampling, local processing, and serial data output.
Captured wiring, board bring-up, and validation steps for technical review.
Organized diagrams and test notes to make the design intent easy to evaluate.

projects.title: Portfolio Documentation System
projects.summary: A static portfolio system that organizes engineering projects, source links, diagrams, documents, and resume materials.
highlights: Built a searchable project library for fast technical review.
Separated project data from presentation to keep project entries structured.
Published the portfolio through GitHub Pages with a custom domain.

projects.title: Analog Control Bench Test
projects.summary: A bench-tested analog control project with schematics, measurements, instrumentation notes, and design reflections.
highlights: Defined design assumptions, test setup, and measurement strategy.
Presented schematics and supporting documents for technical inspection.
Recorded observed behavior, failure modes, and next iteration priorities.
